title: eleocharis camptotricha
intro: Eleocharis camptotricha, also known as flat-stemmed spike-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis camptotricha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
